prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为78→77→127→86→110名，整体呈波动上升趋势，近5年位次在77–127之间震荡，2025年基准位次约110名；该校在海南省招生计划2021–2025年连续5年均为7人，2026年扩招至9人，增幅约28.6%，扩招有利于位次后移（竞争略有缓解）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中 国科学技术大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续6年稳居第7名（2021–2026年），属于全国顶尖高校阵营，对高分考生吸引力极强；2025年声 誉评价偏正面（李政道先生逝世与少年班渊源引发正面关注）；2026年声誉评价偏负面（个别师德师风事件），但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第12位（高热），短视频曝光量大 ，反映报考关注度持续较高；拥有19个A-及以上学科，其中A+学科8个（化学、地球物理学、天文学、安全科学与工程、数学、物理学、生物学、科学技术史） ，A学科3个（工商管理、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术），学科实力顶尖，对理工类考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、数学/统计等中 科大核心招生专业社会热度持续偏热至高热；海南省2026年高考报名总人数约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，非海南省本地高校，在海南招生人数较少（2025年仅7人），属跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招28.6%（位次后移约19名）与海南省考生规模大幅增长15.7%（竞争加剧，位次前移约10–15名）两股相反力量，以及抖音高热反映的报考热度上升，预计2026年最 低录取位次在2025年110名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约135名，区间120–150名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类
- 电子信息类
- 数学类
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类
- 工科试验班（力学及航天、人形机器人、未来能源及安全）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班类（量子未来技术试点班）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间120–150名内建议以二档专业为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于120名可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等一档王牌专业；位次接近150名建议优先考虑二 档工科试验班及理科试验班类，确保录取概率。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were 78 → 77 → 127 → 86 → 110, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. Over the past five years, rankings oscillated between 77 and 127, with a baseline ranking of approximately 110 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province remained at 7 students for five consecutive years from 2021 to 2025, and will expand to 9 students in 2026, an increase of about 28.6%. This expansion is conducive to a backward shift in rankings (slightly easing competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Science and Technology of China is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 7th in the Shanghai Ranking of Chinese Universities for six consecutive years (2021–2026), placing it among the top-tier universities in the country, which strongly attracts high-scoring candidates. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was slightly positive (the death of Mr. Tsung-Dao Lee and the connection with the Special Class for the Gifted Young sparked positive attention). In 2026, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative (individual incidents of teacher ethics), but the overall impact was limited. It ranks 12th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention from applicants. It has 19 A- or above disciplines, including 8 A+ disciplines (Chemistry, Geophysics, Astronomy, Safety Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, History of Science and Technology) and 3 A disciplines (Business Administration, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology). Its academic strength is top-tier, making it particularly attractive to science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at USTC, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Mathematics/Statistics, continue to be hot to very hot in social popularity. In 2026, the total number of Hainan Province college entrance examination registrants is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university in Hainan. It enrolls a small number of students in Hainan (only 7 in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the opposing forces of a 28.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 (shifting rankings backward by about 19 places) and a 15.7% significant increase in the number of Hainan candidates (intensifying competition, shifting rankings forward by about 10–15 places), along with the high Douyin popularity reflecting increased application heat, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 110. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 135, with a range of 120–150.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science
- Electronic Information
- Mathematics
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Physics
- Engineering Experimental Class (Mechanics and Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Future Energy and Safety)
- Science Experimental Class (Top-notch Program Science and Technology Elite Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Quantum Future Technology Pilot Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 120–150, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than 120, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to 150, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class and Science Experimental Class to ensure admission probability.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
